name: Nacos
description: Alibabas distributed configuration, service discovery and registry platform for microservices; Spring Cloud Alibaba core.

seo.title: Nacos — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Nacos: Alibabas distributed configuration, service discovery and registry platform for microservices; Spring Cloud Alibaba core.

when_to_use: Service registry and discovery for Spring Cloud apps
Distributed config management for microservices fleet
Dynamic configuration updates without service restart
DNS and RPC-based service discovery for Java services

review.verdict: Solid OSS config and service registry if you're in the Java Spring world, rough edges outside China's ecosystem.
review.best_for: Java microservices teams using Spring Cloud Alibaba
review.not_for: Kubernetes-native stacks preferring Consul or etcd

lock_in.reason: Open source Apache 2.0 config/discovery, fully portable

transparency.reason: Free and open source, no pricing needed

developer_experience.reason: Solid docs, Spring Cloud integration, active community
